text:
Once upon a time, in the heart of a lush forest, there was a small stream that wound its way through the trees. The stream was not just any ordinary stream; it had a magical property that made everything around it grow beautifully and bloom with vibrant colors. The water was so clear you could see tiny fish swimming among the pebbles at the bottom.

In this forest, there lived a young rabbit named Luna. Luna was known for her curiosity and adventurous spirit. Every day, she would explore different parts of the forest, but her favorite place to visit was near the magical stream. She loved the way the sun filtered through the leaves, creating a shimmering effect on the water, and how the flowers seemed to dance as the breeze caressed them.

One sunny morning, Luna noticed something peculiar by the stream. A single daisy, usually found only on the far side of the forest, was blooming right next to the stream. It was as if it had been carried there by
